nasb.text: It stood still, but I could not discern its appearance; A form was before my eyes; There was silence, then I heard a voice:

esv.text: It stood still, but I could not discern its appearance. A form was before my eyes; there was silence, then I heard a voice:

cnv.text: 那靈站住， 我辨不出他的形狀， 只見有一形象在我眼前， 然後我聽見低微的聲音，說：

ccb.text: 那灵停住， 我无法辨认其模样。 眼前出现一个形状， 寂静中听见有声音说，
